purpose: RU domain expansion — systematic search of Russian market for Honeywell PPE sources beyond vseinstrumenti.ru
trigger: Owner: 'я считаю что копать надо там где получается. а ты взял всего лишь 2 российских сайта. Активнее используй яндекс.'
search_approach: WebSearch: '1015021 Honeywell наушники купить цена рублей'
WebSearch: '1012541 Honeywell наушники каска купить цена рублей'
WebSearch: 'Honeywell Howard Leight Leightning наушники СИЗ дистрибьютор Россия'
WebSearch: 'Honeywell Leightning L1HHV 1015021 наушники купить цена сайт Россия 2025'
WebSearch: 'Honeywell Leightning L3H 1012541 наушники каска цена рублей купить интернет'
WebSearch: 'Honeywell Leightning наушники каска дистрибьютор официальный Россия'
WebFetch: vseinstrumenti.ru category + individual product pages
WebFetch: bionic.spb.ru, gwardex.ru, kovkapro.com, technoavia.ru, vostok.spb.ru, sizproject.ru, biggame.ru, tdrrk.ru, honeywellrussia.ru, honeywell.ru
Script access test: requests.py HTTP status + PN presence in HTML body

results_per_domain.verdict: existing entry — only RU source with public prices for these exact SKUs
NEW — script-accessible, PN confirmed, no public price. lineage blocker = structured matching, not 403
NEW — script-accessible with public prices for related PPE (L1H). No 1015021/1012541 in catalog
NEW — script-accessible. Has Leightning L2 only
STALE — search results show old URLs, pages removed. Not a usable source
WRONG — consumer gift site, not PPE catalog
BLOCKED — same access pattern as EU sites
NO MATCH — VeriShield/L2 only, not Leightning helmet series
PARTIAL — Honeywell PPE section exists but no catalog details visible
WRONG — shooting/hunting store, Impact Sport only

class_B_structured_match_missing.cause: Script gets HTTP 200 + HTML, but PN matching logic fails (page structure differs from expected)
class_B_structured_match_missing.fix: Script improvement: extend PN extraction patterns for these page layouts
class_B_structured_match_missing.price_outcome: Prices visible on page (gwardex.ru confirmed); bionic.spb.ru rfq_only

class_C_product_not_listed.cause: Site carries Honeywell PPE but not 1015021/1012541 specifically
class_C_product_not_listed.fix: N/A — catalog gap, not technical issue

key_findings.public_price_sources_for_1015021_1012541: vseinstrumenti.ru remains the ONLY Russian source with confirmed public prices (4314 / 5356 RUB). No new sources found.
key_findings.script_accessible_new_domains: 3 new script-accessible domains found: bionic.spb.ru (PN confirmed, rfq_only), gwardex.ru (public price for L1H 4250.60 RUB in_stock), kovkapro.com (L2 only)
key_findings.bionic_pn_confirmation: bionic.spb.ru confirms both 1015021 and 1012541 exist in Russian market (HTTP 200, PN in HTML). No public price but strong PN existence signal.
key_findings.lineage_class_B_opportunity: bionic.spb.ru and gwardex.ru are HTTP 200 accessible — lineage=False is due to structured_exact_match_missing, not 403. Script pattern extension could unlock lineage=True for gwardex.ru (has public prices).
key_findings.market_saturation: 10+ domains searched. The Leightning L1HHV and L3H EU helmet series are narrowly distributed in Russia — vseinstrumenti.ru dominates public pricing for this niche.

new_domains_for_registry.notes: SPb hearing protection distributor. PN confirmed for both target SKUs. Price = rfq_only. Valuable for PN existence confirmation. Upgrade path: script pattern extension for structured matching.
Russian СИЗ distributor with Honeywell PPE. Script-accessible. Has public prices for Leightning L1/L1H. Upgrade path: extend catalog or script matching.
RU/CIS delivery shop for Honeywell Leightning. Limited catalog (L2 only). Low priority.

recommended_next_actions: 1. Add bionic.spb.ru + gwardex.ru + kovkapro.com to source_scout_registry_v1.jsonl
2. Consider script pattern extension for 'structured_exact_match_missing' class (separate task, LOW risk)
3. For 1015021/1012541 public_price: vseinstrumenti.ru product pages confirmed — owner manual browser verify is still the fastest path
4. Expand search to other Honeywell PPE product families (harness, glasses) using gwardex.ru as new script-accessible source
